name: Honey-And-Spice Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the peel from 2 lemons and trim off as much white membrane as possible. Cut the peel lengthwise into thin strips. Squeeze the juice of 3 tablespoons from the lemons.
2. In a 1-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook the lemon peel and juice with honey, mixed pickling spice, and salt for about 5 minutes.
